item.title: [AIGC Guide] The Antigravity + Claude Code Hybrid Workflow: A New Era of AI Engineering
item.description: Combining Google's Antigravity and Anthropic's Claude Code to maximize productivity while minimizing token costs through a sophisticated hybrid tier orchestration.

item.title: Hello, World.
item.description: A quick introduction to who I am, what I'm interested in, and what this blog is about.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hi, I’m Ethan Choi.

I’m a Senior Platform / DevOps Engineer specializing in Cloud infrastructure and AI tooling, currently based in Auburn, Alabama. I work at NSoft America, where I focus on cloud governance, infrastructure automation, and AI-driven engineering workflows.

What I Do

Senior Platform / DevOps Engineer @ NSoft America, Inc. (Feb 2026 – Present)

  • Designing AWS multi-account governance and standardizing Terraform-based IaC workflows
  • Implementing agentic AI coding workflows to accelerate internal tooling development
  • Building MVP automation tools using agentic workflows to streamline business processes

Career

Period Company Role
2025.08 – 2025.12 Penguin Solutions Sr. DevOps Engineer — GPU-as-a-Service (SK Telecom AI Data Center)
2025.06 – 2025.08 K soft DevOps Engineer — Samsung F&MI AI Infrastructure (AWS/Azure)
2025.04 – 2025.06 Scatter X Product Engineer — SK Hynix Big Data & AI Platform
2024.10 – 2025.03 Keysol L&C DevOps Engineer — SK Energy Muffin App (AKS)
2024.04 – 2024.09 Logosin Technical Architect — Samsung Semiconductor Kubernetes
2022.08 – 2024.03 Bespin Global Kubernetes Engineer — Samsung Electronics & Telecom RCS (EKS)
2022.01 – 2022.06 MITMAS Kubernetes Engineer — Cluster operations & automation
2019.10 – 2020.06 NS Shopping DevOps Developer — AWS CI/CD & security pipeline
2019.06 – 2019.10 Catenoid Inc. Back-end Developer — KBS Media (Lambda/Node.js)
2018.09 – 2019.04 inost Back-end Developer — Samsung SDS chatbot services
2016.12 – 2018.01 Uracle Back-end Developer — SK Broadband billing system
2015.09 – 2016.08 Zioyou Full Stack Developer — iOS/Android messenger

Tech Stack

Cloud & Infra — AWS Azure Kubernetes Terraform Helm Ansible
